claim_gate.reason: The full-rank PGM resolves clean information complexity but no polynomial implementation of coherent subset-sum fiber erasure, Gram inversion, or collision walking has been constructed.

ensemble_theorem.implementation_reduction: an isometry |F_s>->|s>|0> followed by QFT implements the clean covariant PGM
ensemble_theorem.information_upper_bound: P_PGM<=|supp(c)|/N<=min(1,D/N), so m>=n-O(log n) is necessary for inverse-polynomial success
ensemble_theorem.scope: clean independent DCP phase states with fixed public labels; circuit efficiency, f=1 contamination, and lattice composition are separate obligations

falsifiers_triggered: The DCP obstruction at m=Theta(n) is not clean information-theoretic: the exact covariant PGM can have constant success.
An exact PGM success formula is not a polynomial-time algorithm because its outcome space and naive multiplicity table have size N.
Computing S(x) while retaining x does not implement the normalized-fiber isometry required by the PGM.
Exact residue DP/MPS and polynomial-trace reference banks are already blocked by separate no-go theorems.
Any claimed implementation must survive exact f=1 contamination and compose with full reflection/lattice recovery.

implementation_routes.blocker: The success formula is not a uniform circuit construction.
implementation_routes.falsification_or_next_test: Produce a poly(n)-gate implicit implementation with no N-sized advice or QRAM.
implementation_routes.operation: materialize N PGM outcomes or the N-entry subset-sum multiplicity table
implementation_routes.resource_status: exponential description and preprocessing in n=log2 N

implementation_routes.blocker: Requires coherent indexing/unindexing of modular subset-sum solution fibers.
implementation_routes.exact_status: sufficient exact implementation of the covariant PGM
implementation_routes.falsification_or_next_test: Construct ranking, unranking, or uniform-fiber preparation with polynomial worst-case cost.
implementation_routes.operation: map every normalized fiber |F_s> to |s>|0> and apply the cyclic QFT

implementation_routes.blocker: The exact residue MPS/DP no-go applies.
implementation_routes.falsification_or_next_test: Use an approximate representation with a proved measurement-error bound.
implementation_routes.operation: track every reachable prefix residue and synthesize normalized fibers
implementation_routes.resource_status: exponential bond/table size with high probability

implementation_routes.blocker: The public low-trace effect theorem applies.
implementation_routes.falsification_or_next_test: A valid route must be genuinely full-rank/many-outcome rather than postselection in disguise.
implementation_routes.operation: postselect on one or polynomially many public fiber reference directions

implementation_routes.blocker: No polynomial normalization, condition-number, state-preparation, or output-decoding proof.
implementation_routes.falsification_or_next_test: Build a block encoding without subset-sum counting advice and charge polynomial approximation error.
implementation_routes.operation: implement the PGM through an implicit block encoding of the ensemble Gram operator

implementation_routes.blocker: No rapidly mixing implementable walk or complete decoder is known in this project.
implementation_routes.falsification_or_next_test: Prove spectral gap, coherent update cost, retained phase, f=1 robustness, and full decoding.
implementation_routes.operation: coherently walk among equal-sum subsets and decode the covariant phase

summary: Audited 96 random-label ensembles. Mean exact clean PGM success at m=n is 0.582653, but polynomial PGM circuits, coherent fiber erasures, exact-f=1 robust PGMs, and lattice compositions all remain zero.
